name: How LLMs Might Think

description: arXiv:2604.09674v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Do large language models (LLMs) think? Daniel Stoljar and Zhihe Vincent Zhang have recently developed an argument from rationality for the claim that LLMs do not think. We contend, however, that the argument from rationality not only falters, but leaves open an intriguing possibility: that LLMs engage only in arational, associative forms of th...
author: Joseph Gottlieb, Ethan Kemp, Matthew Trager
